responses.roadComment: Many sinking manholes throughout our area . Approach road to main road is very steep and problematic. No foothpaths of standing place for people beaides main road for baording busses etc
responses.businessComment: Parking congestion can be improved ,footpaths can be build ,proper parking spaces have to be available
responses.loveText: Less congestion and large open places ( private and public offices ) keep the area relatively cool due to trees and air flow and ventilation is not a problem but things are beginning to change.
responses.commentsText: Overall there are systems that are in place but they donot work everytime and often donot coearly address the problem .
